data.title: Microservices Framework
data.description: The architecture is based on microservices to ensure scalability and independent deployment.
data.technical_spec: Uses Docker containers and Kubernetes for orchestration.

data.title: RESTful API Design
data.description: APIs are designed to be RESTful, allowing for easy extension and third-party integration.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes JSON for data interchange and adheres to HTTP standards.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Deployed on scalable cloud providers to handle high traffic volumes.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS with auto-scaling groups and load balancers.

data.title: Data-Driven Architecture
data.description: The architecture supports real-time data processing and analytics.
data.technical_spec: Uses Apache Kafka and Apache Spark for data streaming and analysis.

data.title: Secure Access and Authentication
data.description: Access control is managed through secure authentication services.
data.technical_spec: Implements OAuth 2.0 and JWT for secure token handling.
